Sports.headline: PSL controversy: Afridi fined for 'forcefully escorting' 4 visitors to hotel room
Sports.summary: Pakistan pacer Shaheen Afridi has been fined PKR 1 million by Lahore Qalandars for violating hotel security protocols during the PSL.
